dream_text: A yellow elevator. My old school. Someone was carrying a fish. Then I was suddenly on a train with no shoes.

insight.notice: There isn’t enough here to know why these fragments stayed together. The yellow elevator, carried fish, and missing shoes may simply be the details that remained after the rest faded.
